sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Constellation Energy declares qtrly dividend of $0.4265 per share
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.4265 per share, payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. This announcement confirms the company's consistent dividend payment to its investors.

feed.title: Principal keeps A+ insurer ratings as AM Best holds outlook stable
feed.summary: AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A+ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings of "aa" (Superior) for Principal Life Insurance Company and Principal National Life Insurance Company, both components of Principal Financial Group (PFG). The ratings reflect Principal's very strong balance sheet strength, strong operating performance, favorable business profile, and very strong enterprise risk management, with a stable outlook. This comes as Principal has shifted focus towards fee-based products and strengthened its capital and risk modeling.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Named a Top Performer in Hearts & Wallets Customer Satisfaction Survey for the Eighth Time
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP) has been recognized for the eighth year as a Top Performer in the Hearts & Wallets 2026 Wants & Pricing Report for being a company that "understands me and shares my values." This distinction highlights Ameriprise's consistent commitment to personalized financial planning, based on a survey of nearly 6,000 U.S. households. The company's senior vice president of marketing, Marie O’Neill, credited their brand strength and financial advisors for the sustained recognition.

feed.title: Insider sale of 6,735 shares reported at TRV (NYSE: TRV) in Form 144
feed.summary: An insider at Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) has filed a Form 144 indicating their intent to sell 6,735 shares. This sale follows a stock option exercise scheduled for April 28, 2026, for cash. The filing also notes a previous sale of 4,756 shares by Avrohom J. Kess on February 20, 2026.

feed.title: KLA Corporation and NXP Semiconductors Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: KLA Corporation and NXP Semiconductors experienced a stock price drop due to a broad selloff in the semiconductor industry. This downturn was triggered by concerns over future AI spending after OpenAI missed internal targets and escalating U.S.-China tensions regarding AI technology and supply chains. Despite the current dip, KLA Corporation has shown significant year-to-date growth and long-term returns for investors.

feed.title: INVH Initiates Coverage On Compass Point -- Rating Set to Neutra
feed.summary: Compass Point has initiated coverage on Invitation Homes (INVH) with a Neutral rating, reflecting a cautious stance despite the stock being 24.8% undervalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value™. The company, which focuses on single-family rental homes, shows strong financial health and growth potential with a GF Score™ of 80/100, though it has a lower momentum score. Investors are advised to approach INVH with caution, considering the potential buying opportunity due to undervaluation against the analyst's neutral outlook.

feed.title: McDonald's (MCD) to Introduce New Crafted Beverages on May 6
feed.summary: McDonald's (MCD) will launch six new crafted beverages in U.S. locations starting May 6, targeting younger consumers and competing with Starbucks and Dunkin'. The company, with a strong market position and a GF Score of 86/100, aims to enhance customer engagement and sales. Despite strong profitability and growth potential, recent insider selling and a moderate financial strength rating suggest investors should proceed with caution.

feed.title: Emerson Electric (EMR) Share Price, Sales Growth, and Revenue Forecast – 2026 Analysis - News and Statistics
feed.summary: An analysis by IndexBox indicates that Emerson Electric (EMR) has shown modest returns and sluggish growth. Over the past six months, the company delivered a 4.4% return, with its share price at $140.01. Sales growth and revenue forecasts are considered underwhelming, and a declining free cash flow margin suggests increasing investment needs.

feed.title: AES Brasil Energia S.A. stock (BRAESBACNOR1): Why does its renewable energy focus matter more now for global investors?
feed.summary: AES Brasil Energia S.A. (BRAESBACNOR1) is a key player in Brazil's accelerating energy transition, focusing heavily on wind and solar power. This strategy positions the company to benefit from the growing global demand for clean energy and offers U.S. and English-speaking investors diversified exposure to an emerging market's green energy sector without direct currency risk, thanks to its B3 listing. The firm's long-term contracts, operational efficiency, and parent company backing support predictable dividends and growth, appealing to both income-focused and ESG-mandated portfolios.

feed.title: Fed Meeting Preview: Powell's Last Hawkish Stand?
feed.summary: The Federal Reserve is heading into its April meeting under pressure, with markets now pricing in no rate cuts for all of 2026, a significant reversal from earlier expectations. Chairman Jerome Powell is expected to maintain a hawkish stance due to heating inflation, firm growth, and economic uncertainties from the Iran war. The prospect of Kevin Warsh succeeding Powell as Fed chair is also discussed, though policy changes from this transition are deemed unlikely in the short term.

feed.title: Virginia American Water Proudly Recognizes American Water Charitable Foundation 2026 Water and Environment Grantees
feed.summary: The American Water Charitable Foundation and Virginia American Water have announced the recipients of their 2026 Water and Environment grants. Four nonprofit organizations in Virginia, including Wilderness Kids, Friendship Veterans Fire Association of Alexandria Virginia, James River Association, and Jessica Ann Moore Foundation, received a combined $77,199. These grants support projects focused on clean water, conservation, environmental education, and water-based recreation, reflecting American Water's commitment to investing in communities and environmental stewardship.

feed.title: Union Pacific EVP Kenyatta Rocker sells $7.44 million in shares
feed.summary: Kenyatta G. Rocker, EVP of Marketing & Sales at Union Pacific Corp (NYSE:UNP), sold 27,387 shares of company stock for $7.44 million on April 24, 2026, while also acquiring the same number of shares through stock options for $4.81 million. Following these transactions, Mr. Rocker directly holds over 61,000 shares of Union Pacific. The company recently reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with multiple analysts raising their price targets for the stock.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Urges BW Stockholders Who Lost Money Investing in Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises to Contact the Firm for Information About Leading the Class Action
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is urging stockholders of Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises (NYSE: BW) who lost money to contact the firm regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Babcock & Wilcox misled investors by failing to disclose critical information about a Power Generation Contract, including the close ties between its largest shareholder, BRC, and the counterparty, Base Electron, and whether Applied Digital actually needed the products. As a result of a Wolfpack Research report exposing these issues, the stock price fell by 11.59%.

feed.title: NBA Expansion In Las Vegas Attracts Magic Johnson - Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO), Blackstone (NYSE
feed.summary: The NBA is looking to expand with new teams in Las Vegas and Seattle, expecting to sell franchises for at least $10 billion. High-profile investors like Magic Johnson, Bill Foley, and Marc Lasry are showing interest in the Las Vegas team, while Samantha Holloway is positioning for a bid in Seattle. The league's board of governors is expected to decide on expansion later this year, with private equity firms also actively investing in professional sports.

feed.title: Boeing and Copa Airlines Announce Order for up to 60 737 MAX Jets
feed.summary: Boeing and Copa Airlines announced an order for 40 737 MAX airplanes, with options for up to 20 more, to expand and modernize Copa's all-737 fleet. This agreement, along with existing orders, will lead to over 100 new 737 MAX aircraft for Copa, enabling further network expansion from its "Hub of the Americas." The airline emphasized the efficiency and versatility of the 737 MAX in supporting its growth and contributing to Panama's economic development.

feed.title: Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP) EVP exercises options and sells 27,387 shares
feed.summary: Kenyatta G. Rocker, EVP Marketing & Sales at Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP), exercised stock options to acquire 27,387 shares and subsequently sold the same number of shares on April 24, 2026, at $271.76 per share. Following these transactions, Rocker directly held 61,101.9337 shares of Union Pacific common stock, in addition to indirect holdings. This insider activity resulted in a net sale of 27,387 shares totaling $7.44 million.

feed.title: Box Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Document Management
feed.summary: Box, Inc. has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Document Management, validating its AI transformation and commitment to secure, AI-powered enterprise content platforms. The company emphasizes delivering governed agentic experiences for businesses, including highly regulated industries, by enabling AI agents to interact securely with enterprise content. Box's COO, Olivia Nottebohm, highlights how their platform empowers AI agents to reason, orchestrate workflows, and execute complex tasks using advanced AI models.

feed.title: Box Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Document Management
feed.summary: Box, Inc. has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Document Management, validating its complete AI transformation and commitment to secure, AI-powered enterprise content platforms. The company focuses on enabling AI agents with secure access to enterprise content, catering to highly regulated industries. This recognition highlights Box's ability to execute and completeness of vision in empowering customers to use Box AI for analyzing, managing, and processing content effectively.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management discloses 5.39% stake in Everest Group Ltd (EG)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a 5.39% stake in Everest Group Ltd (EG), holding 2,180,240 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates Vanguard possesses sole dispositive power over all these shares but only sole voting power over 12,150 shares, suggesting limited voting influence despite its significant economic ownership. This Schedule 13G filing aggregates holdings across various Vanguard affiliates and managed accounts.

feed.title: This Kansas lender bought back 3.08M shares and set a May 15 payout
feed.summary: Capitol Federal Financial (NASDAQ: CFFN) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.085 per share, payable May 15, 2026. The company also repurchased 3,083,445 shares at an average cost of $7.27 per share between January 1 and April 22, 2026. Capitol Federal Financial will release its financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: CAPITOL FEDERAL FINANCIAL, INC.® ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND AND STOCK BUYBACK UPDATE
feed.summary: Capitol Federal Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: CFFN) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.085 per share payable on May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 1, 2026. The company also reported repurchasing over 3 million shares of common stock between January 1, 2026, and April 22, 2026, at an average cost of $7.27 per share. Financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, are scheduled for release on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Q1 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article provides a preview of Vulcan Materials' Q1 2026 earnings. It is currently a placeholder, as the actual content is missing and only "MSN" is present.

feed.title: Cogent Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ:COGT) Sees Large Drop in Short Interest
feed.summary: Cogent Biosciences (NASDAQ:COGT) experienced a significant 30.9% drop in short interest in April, totaling 12,038,491 shares. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $43.45. Trading near $36.56, Cogent Biosciences has a market capitalization of $6.24 billion and recently reported a quarterly loss of ($0.55) EPS.

feed.title: American Electric Power Company, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend Payable June 10, 2026
feed.summary: American Electric Power Company, Inc. has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of 95 cents per share on its common stock. This dividend is payable on June 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 8, 2026. This marks the company's 464th consecutive quarterly common stock cash dividend, with AEP having paid a cash dividend every quarter since July 1910.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Ecolab Q1 2026 meets EPS forecast, slight revenue beat
feed.summary: Ecolab reported a stable Q1 2026 financial performance, meeting its EPS forecast of $1.7 and slightly exceeding revenue expectations with $4.07 billion. The company achieved 13% year-over-year EPS growth, driven by strong pricing and cost management, despite ongoing challenges from commodity costs and geopolitical uncertainties. Ecolab expects continued momentum, projecting strong EPS growth in coming quarters and aiming for 20% operating income margin by 2027, bolstered by strategic acquisitions in high-growth, high-margin sectors like Global High-Tech and Life Sciences.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] Allegion plc Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management LLC has reported a passive institutional ownership of 4,601,917 shares, representing 5.34% of Allegion plc's outstanding common stock as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 10,460 shares. The report, signed on April 28, 2026, by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, highlights Vanguard's role as a passive investor.

feed.title: Ametek Near Deal For Part of CD&R-Owned Industrials Company
feed.summary: Ametek is reportedly in exclusive talks to acquire parts of Indicor, an industrials company owned by Clayton, Dubilier & Rice. The deal specifically targets Indicor's testing and measurement businesses and is valued at approximately $5 billion. This potential acquisition would expand Ametek's portfolio in the industrial sector.

feed.title: Cleveland-Cliffs taps Palantir to deploy AI across steelmaking operations
feed.summary: Cleveland-Cliffs is partnering with Palantir Technologies to integrate AI into its steelmaking operations, moving away from manual spreadsheet-based systems. This collaboration aims to enhance the interface between operations and commercial activities, improving real-time production planning and order entry, beginning with its Middletown, Ohio, steel plant.

feed.title: Citizens & Northern (CZNC) investors approve directors, 2025 pay and Crowe LLP
feed.summary: Citizens & Northern Corporation shareholders held their virtual Annual Meeting on April 23, 2026, approving the election of Class II and Class III directors for three-year terms. They also approved the 2025 compensation of named executive officers and ratified Crowe LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the year ending December 31, 2026. Approximately 69% of outstanding shares were represented at the meeting.

feed.title: Texas Instruments launches the TI-84 Evo Graphing Calculator -- the most advanced TI-84 ever built
feed.summary: Texas Instruments Education Technology has launched the TI-84 Evo Graphing Calculator, an advanced version of the TI-84 series. It features a 3x faster processor, 50% more graphing space, and a redesigned keypad, while remaining distraction-free without Wi-Fi. The calculator is approved for major standardized exams like the ACT, SAT, IB, and AP, making it suitable for students from middle school through college.

feed.title: Union Pacific’s Big Boy to Tour the Northeast for First Time in Honor of America’s 250th Anniversary
feed.summary: Union Pacific's Big Boy No. 4014, the world's largest operating steam locomotive, will embark on a historic coast-to-coast tour in collaboration with Norfolk Southern to celebrate America's 250th anniversary. This marks Big Boy's first-ever journey across the Mississippi River into the Ohio Valley and Northeast, including major display events in eight cities and over 50 whistle-stops in 10 states. The tour, which commenced on April 10th and will conclude on July 29th, highlights the shared legacy of American railroads in the nation's economic growth.

feed.title: UnitedHealth and Humana Soar in April: Which Healthcare Stock Is Winning and Why
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) and Humana (HUM) stocks have both seen significant rebounds in April, with UnitedHealth leading due to strong Q1 earnings and its diversified Optum unit. UnitedHealth's adjusted EPS beat consensus, and it raised its 2026 outlook, while Humana's rally is a recovery from earlier lows, buoyed by Medicare Advantage growth but facing concentration risk. Investors are watching for Humana's Q1 2026 results and medical cost trend commentary from both companies amidst a broader managed care recovery.

feed.title: This SC town is set to get its first Chipotle restaurant. Here’s when it opens
feed.summary: Greenwood, South Carolina, is scheduled to open its first Chipotle Mexican Grill location on April 30 at 438 Bypass 72 NW. The new restaurant will offer dine-in, takeout, and a "Chipotlane" drive-thru, operating daily from 10:45 a.m. to 10 p.m. This expansion will bring 30 new jobs to the area.

feed.title: Amgen, Astra launch real-time trials as part of FDA pilot
feed.summary: The FDA announced that Amgen and AstraZeneca have begun real-time clinical trials as part of a new pilot program. This initiative aims to accelerate drug development through the use of AI and data science.

feed.title: PepsiCo (PEP) — Shareholders push for human-rights effectiveness disclosure ahead of AGM
feed.summary: Shareholders are urging PepsiCo to disclose the effectiveness of its human rights policies and due diligence systems ahead of its May 6 annual general meeting. Proposal 5, supported by various faith-based and institutional investors, requests outcome-focused reporting across direct operations, franchisees, and value chain relationships, citing current gaps in information regarding risk identification, mitigation, and remediation. The proponents emphasize that this is a call for decision-useful effectiveness disclosure, not merely more descriptive information or changes to sourcing strategies.

feed.title: Advisor moves: Wells Fargo nabs $466M UBS veteran in Naples
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has successfully recruited Douglas DiGiorno, a veteran from UBS with over $466 million in assets, to lead the DiGiorno Wealth Management Group in Naples, Florida. This move is part of a broader recruitment effort by Wells Fargo, bringing in four other advisors managing a combined total of over $950 million. Concurrently, Raymond James has added a three-advisor team from Wells Fargo's independent network, managing $480 million, while JPMorgan has secured a $400 million advisor from Goldman Sachs in New York.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners (NASDAQ:CCEP) Plans Dividend of €0.82
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners (CCEP) has declared a dividend of €0.82 per share, payable on May 27th to stockholders of record on May 15th. The dividend is deemed sustainable with a payout ratio of 48.7% and expected EPS of $5.49 next year. Analysts currently give CCEP a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $107.00.

feed.title: CIBC (CM) issues 4.80% callable senior notes — May 2031 maturity
feed.summary: Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (CIBC) is offering 4.80% callable senior global medium-term notes with a maturity date of May 14, 2031. These unlisted notes, issued in U.S. dollars in $1,000 denominations, pay semi-annual interest and are callable by CIBC annually from May 2028 to May 2030. A key feature is their "bail-inable" nature, meaning they can be converted into CIBC common shares under Canadian bank resolution powers, exposing investors to potential risks.

feed.title: How Will Automatic Data Processing Stock React To Its Upcoming Earnings?
feed.summary: This article analyzes how Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) stock might react to its upcoming earnings report on April 29, 2026, by examining historical post-earnings stock movements. It reviews one-day, five-day, and twenty-one-day returns, noting that positive one-day returns occurred in 55% of the last 20 earnings reports. The analysis also explores the correlation between short-term and medium-term returns to help traders understand potential post-earnings trends.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Stock Jumps as Centene Results Put Insurer Turnaround Back in Play
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group shares rose about 4% after Centene's positive profit outlook, suggesting that medical-cost pressures for insurers might be easing. UnitedHealth also recently increased its 2026 profit forecast and reported a good first quarter, with its Optum unit still addressing challenges. Despite these positive signs, risks remain from ongoing high care utilization and potential government payout shortfalls.

feed.title: Union Pacific’s Big Boy to Tour the Northeast for First Time in Honor of America’s 250th Anniversary
feed.summary: Union Pacific's historic Big Boy No. 4014 steam locomotive will embark on its first East Coast tour, collaborating with Norfolk Southern for America's 250th anniversary celebration. The tour includes over 50 whistle-stops and major display events in eight cities across 10 states, marking Big Boy's return to the Ohio Valley and Northeast for the first time since 1941. This initiative highlights the railroads' shared legacy in connecting communities and fueling national growth, emphasizing the significance of rail within the US economy.

feed.title: Caesars Casino Bonus Code ROTOCASLAUNCH in April: Score $1k & 2.5K Rewards Credits
feed.summary: The Caesars Casino bonus code ROTOCASLAUNCH for April 2026 offers new players a welcome package including a $10 no-deposit bonus, a 100% deposit match up to $1,000, and 2,500 Caesars Rewards Credits. This promotion is available in Michigan, New Jersey, West Virginia, and Pennsylvania, providing both immediate play and long-term value through its loyalty program integration. Wagering requirements apply, primarily for select slot games, and players must be 21 or older and physically located in an eligible state.

feed.title: Generac Q1 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article is a Q1 2026 earnings preview for Generac. However, the provided content is empty, offering no further details about the preview.

feed.title: Ex-Executive Accuses M&T Bank of Favoring Straight Male Peers
feed.summary: A former M&T Bank Corp. vice president, Maria Scorcia, has filed a lawsuit alleging the bank denied her a promotion, paid her less than male peers, and ultimately fired her due to her gender and sexual orientation. Scorcia claims her supervisor subjected her to "second-class citizen" treatment and gave preferential access to heterosexual male colleagues. She also alleges her protected medical leave rights were violated and an internal discrimination complaint was mocked by human resources.

feed.title: Is Apple Weather down? Users report problems accessing app
feed.summary: Users are reporting outages with the Apple Weather app on Tuesday, April 28, according to Downdetector. The issue seems to stem from problems with The Weather Channel, which Apple Weather uses for its data. Despite numerous user reports, Apple's System Status webpage indicates that Apple Weather is functioning normally.

feed.title: Corning Earnings: Optical Growth Strong, but Lack of a Beat Brings Some Rationalization to Shares
feed.summary: Morningstar has raised its fair value estimate for Corning (GLW) to $105 per share from $95 due to increased estimates for fiber and solar growth after the company reported strong first-quarter results, particularly in optical fiber. Despite this, the stock is still considered significantly overvalued, as shares sold off after the earnings, suggesting a beat was priced in, and current valuations would require unsustainably high data center growth. The company's optical sales surged 36% year over year, contributing significantly to total sales, with optical net margin surpassing 20% for the first time.

feed.title: Lululemon moves to block founder's board nominees; called out for working with rivals (LULU:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Lululemon is advising shareholders to reject board nominees put forward by founder Chip Wilson, urging them to vote for the company's current slate of directors instead. Wilson claims the current board suffers from corporate greed, lack of vision, and declining company culture, contributing to recent share price declines. Lululemon is countering by providing negative context about Wilson's past actions and reminding shareholders they can revoke votes for his nominees.

feed.title: GS Finance notes linked to 8‑stock basket (NYSE: GS) — capped call and buffer
feed.summary: GS Finance Corp. is offering 2-year indexed notes linked to an equally weighted basket of eight stocks. These notes feature a 15% buffer and a capped upside, with an automatic call option on May 14, 2027, for at least $1,208 per $1,000 face amount. The estimated value at pricing is between $900 and $930 per $1,000 face amount, which is below the issue price due to underwriting and hedging costs. Noteholders are exposed to the credit risk of both GS Finance Corp. and its guarantor, The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., and will not receive dividends or shareholder rights from the underlying basket stocks.

feed.title: Industrial loads boost Consumers Energy’s sales as coal plant emergency order costs rise
feed.summary: Consumers Energy saw a significant boost in electricity sales, particularly from industrial customers, with a 5.9% year-over-year increase in the segment during Q1 2026. The company expects sustained annual sales growth of 2% to 3% driven by new and existing large loads, including data centers and industrial facilities. However, the utility is facing rising costs from U.S. Department of Energy emergency orders to keep its J.H. Campbell coal plant operational beyond its planned retirement, with compliance costs reaching $138 million for the second order period alone.

feed.title: Constellation Energy Corporation Declares Dividend, Payable on June 5, 2026
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.4265 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be paid on June 5, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of 5 p.m. Eastern time on May 15, 2026. The announcement was published on April 28, 2026, at 02:20 pm EDT.
